channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Community and Union Push Back Against Proposed Art Park Near City Hall
item.description: A two-acre vacant lot near Los Angeles City Hall is set to become an 'El Corazón Art Park' leased by AltaMed Health Services for $175,000 through 2027. The project, which includes an art gallery, 30 b...

item.title: Protest Vote Against Pauline Hanson Risks National Stability
item.description: The article features letters to the editor discussing the potential consequences of voting for Pauline Hanson's One Nation party as a protest vote. Contributors argue that such a decision could lead t...

item.title: Unifor starts ratification process for potential Ford labor agreement
item.description: The article discusses Unifor, Canada's largest labour union, beginning ratification meetings on Friday for a tentative agreement with Ford Motor Company. The deal, which includes wage increases and im...

item.title: World Cup shifts focus to top players after underdogs exit
item.description: The article discusses the transition of focus in the World Cup from underdog teams to leading players like Lionel Messi, Kylian Mbappé, and Jude Bellingham. It highlights Erling Haaland's disappointin...

item.title: New Golden Arrows Coach Pitso Dladla Focused on Preseason Success
item.description: Pitso Dladla, the new coach of Golden Arrows, has expressed confidence in his ability to quickly adapt to the club after joining from Durban City. He emphasized his familiarity with local talent, whic...

item.title: Uddhav Thackeray Calls on Congress to Support Climate Activist's Protest at Jantar Mantar
item.description: Uddhav Thackeray, leader of Shiv Sena (UBT), has urged Congress leader Rahul Gandhi to visit the ongoing protest by the Cockroach Janta Party at Delhi's Jantar Mantar, supporting climate activist Sona...

item.title: Former Federal Scientist Accused of Foreign Interference Case Involving China
item.description: A former federal scientist, Dennis Lu, has been charged with unauthorized computer use and breach of trust related to an alleged foreign interference case involving China. Retired from Natural Resourc...

item.title: Springboks coach Rassie Erasmus names four uncapped players for Wales clash
item.description: Rugby coach Rassie Erasmus has selected four uncapped players for the Springboks' Nations Championship match against Wales, balancing experience with youth. The four debutants—wing Jaco Williams, flyh...

item.title: Sony Confirms 'God Of War: Laufey' Release Date and Physical Disc Availability
item.description: The developers behind 'God Of War: Laufey' have confirmed the game will launch before the end of 2027, with a physical disc release. This announcement comes despite Sony's broader shift towards digita...

item.title: Peter Nygard Faces Sexual Assault Charges in Montreal Trial
item.description: Fashion mogul Peter Nygard is set to face sexual assault and forcible confinement charges in a Montreal courtroom. The 84-year-old businessman, who founded the now-defunct Nygard International, denies...

item.title: Regional tensions escalate with strikes on Iran and Kuwait near Strait of Hormuz
item.description: The article discusses the recent escalation of regional tensions following strikes on Iranian and Kuwaiti targets, which have intensified the standoff in the Strait of Hormuz. This critical waterway, ...

item.title: CUF Calls on Tanzanians to Preserve National Unity and Peace by Promoting Kiswahili
item.description: The Civic United Front (CUF) has called upon all Tanzanians to continue protecting the country's long-standing peace by strengthening national unity and promoting the use of Kiswahili as a common lang...

item.title: Mobility Aid Distribution to Support 130 People with Disabilities and Improve Independent Living
item.description: About 130 people with mobility disabilities are expected to benefit from a new programme that will distribute essential assistive devices aimed at improving their independence and quality of life. The...

item.title: Summit Fire Under Control as Evacuation Orders Lifted in Antelope Valley
item.description: The Summit fire, which burned near the Los Angeles-San Bernardino county line, has destroyed one home and damaged two others. Despite strong winds, officials reported that crews have made progress in ...

item.title: Tanzania Mobilizes Domestic Funds to Combat HIV/AIDS Epidemic
item.description: The Tanzanian government, in partnership with the Global Fund to Fight AIDS, Tuberculosis and Malaria (GFATM), has successfully collected 2.6 billion shillings through a dedicated levy system to fund ...

item.title: APM announces Bala as Makinde's vice-presidential candidate for 2027 election
item.description: The Allied Peoples’ Movement (APM) has officially nominated Ibrahim Adamu Bala as the running mate for Governor Seyi Makinde in the 2027 presidential election. This choice gives the party a South-Nort...

item.title: Strong El Niño Event Threatens California and Global Climate
item.description: The article discusses the potential impacts of a 'super' El Niño event, which is expected to bring extreme weather conditions, rising ocean temperatures, and heightened risks for California and the gl...

item.title: Kalyani Pramod’s Art Exhibition in Chennai Uses Recycled Materials to Highlight Endangered Species
item.description: Kalyani Pramod, a Chennai-based fibre artist, is set to unveil her solo exhibition 'The Last Glimpse' at Alliance Française of Madras from July 18 to 31. The exhibition features 73 mixed-media textile...

item.title: Kenya Ranks 19th Globally in English Proficiency
item.description: Kenya has ranked 19th globally in English proficiency according to the 2025 EF English Proficiency Index, scoring 593 points. This places Kenya in the 'high proficiency' category, surpassing East Afri...

item.title: Zanzibar's VP Highlights Legal Reforms for National Development
item.description: Zanzibar’s Second Vice-President, Hemed Suleiman Abdulla, emphasized the importance of viewing Tanzania’s legal system as a catalyst for national development and economic growth rather than a restrict...
